Description
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.compile.javaclassir
Intermediate representation before JVM byte code compilation.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final record 
    Allocation.Arg
    The local var is an arg of the fun call.
    static final record 
    Allocation.Field
    The local var is placed on the field of the compiled fun class.
    static final record 
    Allocation.Preloaded
    It is a preloaded fun.
    static final record 
    Allocation.Recv
    The local var is the recv of the fun call.
    static final record 
    Allocation.Stack
    The local var is placed on the data stack.
    static final record 
    Allocation.Unused
    It is not used / not stored.
